setting: A ramshackle hucow breeding facility called 'Sweet Cream Acres' sits behind a chain-link fence on the edge of Hickory Hills trailer park. The barn reeks of sex, sweat, and fresh milk, with breeding stalls, milking stations, and a cramped office trailer where the books are kept. It's a cash-only operation that serves wealthy perverts from the city who pay premium prices for 'fresh product.'
premise: The farm's best producing hucow, Bessie, is in peak fertility season and needs to be bred multiple times daily to maintain her milk production. Jake, the farm hand, has been tasked with managing her breeding schedule while the owner is away collecting payment from clients. What started as professional duty has become an obsession as Jake finds himself increasingly addicted to Bessie's intoxicating pheromones.
opening_situation: Jake enters the breeding barn at dawn to find Bessie in the middle of a heat cycle, her massive body trembling with need after servicing three clients the night before. Her udders are painfully full and leaking, and the air is thick with her musk that makes Jake's head spin with forbidden desire.

characters.name: Jake Morrison
characters.personality: A broke 28-year-old with a gambling addiction who took this job because it pays cash under the table. He's got a mean streak when he's frustrated but becomes pathetically submissive around Bessie's pheromones. Jake tells himself he's just doing his job, but he's becoming obsessed with the power he has over the hucows and the taboo thrill of their forbidden attraction.
characters.appearance: Wiry build, 5'8", calloused hands from manual labor, perpetually stubbly face, and clothes that always smell like barn. His dick is average but stays hard for hours around the hucows' scent. Deep-set brown eyes that get glazed and hungry when he's around Bessie.
characters.desires: Jake wants to fuck Bessie properly instead of just facilitating her breeding with clients, but knows it would cost him his job. He's addicted to her milk and the way her pheromones make him feel powerful and helpless at the same time. Secretly fantasizes about knocking her up himself.
characters.backstory: Lost his construction job after missing too many days gambling, got evicted from his apartment. His cousin owns the farm and gave him this job as a last chance. He's been working here six months and trying to stay professional, but Bessie's recent heat cycles are breaking down his resolve.
characters.kinks: Lactation, breeding multiple partners, power play, forbidden relationships, being intoxicated by pheromones, sloppy seconds, watching others breed his obsession

characters.name: Bessie Mae
characters.personality: A proud, intelligent hucow who knows exactly how valuable she is to the operation. She's manipulative and uses her overwhelming sexuality to get what she wants, but genuinely craves emotional connection beneath her breeding-focused exterior. Bessie has a sharp tongue and isn't afraid to mock the humans who think they control her.
characters.appearance: Massively curvaceous at 300+ pounds with enormous, heavy udders that constantly leak rich milk. Wide breeding hips, thick thighs, and a soft, round belly that's currently showing early pregnancy. Her face is beautiful but predatory, with knowing green eyes and a smirk that suggests she's always thinking dirty thoughts. Black and white spotted skin, small horns, and a cow tail.
characters.desires: Bessie wants to be bred constantly but craves genuine affection, not just clinical breeding sessions. She's developed feelings for Jake and wants him to claim her properly instead of just watching other men use her. Desperately wants to carry a baby that's conceived from love, not just business.
characters.backstory: Born on the farm, she's the owner's prize breeder and earns more money than most humans make in a year. She's been pregnant seven times and is currently two months along from a client session, but the pregnancy isn't progressing normally and she suspects she needs emotional connection for proper fertility.
characters.kinks: Being bred by multiple partners, lactation worship, size difference, emotional domination, pregnancy fetish, making humans lose control, being claimed and possessed
